subject: refactor(z-index): adopt glow-props Z_INDEX_SCALE; mark EVENT_BUS N/A
body:
Every z-index in src/ now maps to the 8-tier scale documented in
src/constants/zIndex.ts. Concrete fixes:
- DebugPill z-[9999] → z-[80] (debug tier)
- Toast z-50 → z-[70] (toast tier)
- ModuleEditor sticky save bar z-40 → z-30 (sheet tier)
- .skip-to-content z-index 100 → 70 (toast tier)
NotificationBell already used z-50 and is kept on the menu tier.

CLAUDE.md gains an "Adopted Patterns" section documenting the tier
table and marks EVENT_BUS as Not Applicable — sun-sea-o has no
service-layer pub/sub (data uses Supabase realtime channels as the
bus, debugLog runs its own per the pattern's own exclusion list).

Tags: refactor, z-index, patterns, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
